assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_009 (Run 2)

CTR lift of 2.1% is valid. The deployment has two specific constraints. First, merchant impression guarantee contracts must be audited — the concentration effect likely reduces some contracted merchants below their guaranteed minimums, creating breach-of-contract exposure. Second, long-tail suppression has compounding catalog health effects not captured in a short-term CTR test. Full rollout should follow a merchant compliance audit and, if needed, implementation of impression share constraints on the ranking.

Verdict: Model is technically ready; deployment requires pre-rollout merchant impression compliance audit.
